title: Ubiquiti UniFi CloudKey+, UCK-G2-SSD
description: UniFi Cloud Key+ SSD combines the best of local and cloud-based device management. It comes pre-installed with UniFi applications (UniFi Network, UniFi Protect, UniFi Access, UniFi Connect, and UniFi Talk) for managing and configuring UniFi products. The front display shows basic information about your network, such as the number of connected APs and clients, or the time of the last motion detection. It supports Bluetooth for quick configuration via mobile apps Video recordings from cameras are stored directly on the built-in 1 TB SSD , which can be replaced with a higher capacity drive. The Cloud Key+ supports only drives that operate with 5V power. Drives requiring additional or higher power are not supported Front display Powered via PoE 802.3af (48V injector) or USB-C (9V / 2A DC adapter) - not included Simple setup via phone Device
